project_type: Next.js 16 App Router SEO anime guide site
build_system: npm with Next.js build (prisma generate + next build)
build_command: cd /projects/sandbox/anime-guide-engine && npx prisma generate && npx next build
verification_instructions: Run `npx prisma generate && npx next build` - build must pass. DATABASE_URL is already set in .env pointing to Neon PostgreSQL.
setup_instructions: npm install && npx prisma generate. DATABASE_URL is already configured in .env
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Node.js 22 available via nvm. Database is remote Neon PostgreSQL.
contribution_requirements: Stay on ui branch. Use existing design system (teal/orange brand colors, semantic tokens). All new pages need metadata, canonical URLs (aniyume.net), and sitemap entries.
key_patterns: - AnimeCard component takes props (title, titleEnglish, slug, coverImage, genres, totalEpisodes, averageScore, status, seasonYear, index). - API routes use prisma + cached() wrapper from lib/cache.ts. - Pages use ISR with revalidate = 86400. - LoadMore component fetches from /api/anime route. - Content generator in lib/content-generator.ts generates HTML strings. - Sidebar.tsx has navigation items. - Footer.tsx has static year/genre lists. - Global CSS in globals.css defines theme tokens and utility classes.
directory_structure: src/app/ - Next.js App Router pages; src/components/ - Shared React components; src/lib/ - Utility libraries (prisma, cache, content-generator); src/app/api/ - API routes (anime, search, cron, og); prisma/ - Schema and migrations; public/ - Static assets
